sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20140" key="blhxw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βληχώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n20140.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bleating, sheepish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:93:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">93.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
